name: User Data Enrichment MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for enriching user data by adding social network links based on provided personal information (name, email, etc.). Enables AI agents to find and append social profile URLs to user records — supporting sales prospecting, lead enrichment, and profile research workflows.
use_cases: Enriching CRM contact records with social network profiles from sales agents
Finding social media profiles for leads from prospecting agents
Building comprehensive user profiles from partial information for research agents
Appending LinkedIn, Twitter, and other social links to contact databases
not_for: Consumer data collection without consent (GDPR/privacy compliance required)
best_when: A sales or marketing team wants AI agents to enrich contact records with verified social network profiles — improving lead quality and enabling more personalized outreach.
avoid_when: You lack proper data processing legal basis (GDPR consent/legitimate interest). Social profile lookup for individuals requires careful legal review in most jurisdictions.

auth.notes: API key for underlying enrichment service. Data source and auth method depend on implementation.

pricing.notes: Pricing depends on the enrichment data source. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: Bounded by underlying enrichment service rate limits

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Personal data enrichment is heavily regulated under GDPR, CCPA, and PIPEDA
Ensure legal basis for processing personal data before deploying in production
Social profile accuracy varies — validate results before using in high-stakes workflows
Tool purpose (finding people's social profiles) requires careful ethical review
Community tool with limited documentation — data source and quality unclear
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Processing personal data (names, emails, social profiles) is heavily regulated. GDPR/CCPA compliance required. Document legal basis for processing. Never use for harassment or stalking purposes.

security_score_components.security_notes: Personal data enrichment requires GDPR/CCPA compliance. Document legal basis. Restrict access to authorized personnel.
